scripts.build:typescript: pnpm --dir packages/core/ts build && pnpm --dir packages/oauth/ts build && pnpm --dir packages/admin/ts build && pnpm --dir packages/transport-a2a/ts build && pnpm --dir packages/identity/ts build && pnpm --dir packages/revocation/ts build && pnpm --dir packages/transport-mcp/ts build && pnpm --dir packages/framework-adaptor/mcp-express/ts build && pnpm --dir packages/framework-adaptor/mcp-fastmcp/ts build && pnpm --dir packages/framework-adaptor/agent-crewai/ts build && pnpm --dir packages/framework-adaptor/agent-langchain/ts build && pnpm --dir packages/state-backend/tokenstate-postgres/ts build && pnpm --dir packages/state-backend/tokencache-cloudflare/ts build && pnpm --dir packages/runtime-adaptor/cloudflare/ts build && pnpm --dir apps/api build && pnpm --dir apps/coordinator build
scripts.ci: pnpm --dir apps/cli sync-embedded && pnpm run build:typescript && pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test
scripts.test: pnpm run test:typescript && pnpm run test:go && pnpm run test:python
scripts.test:typescript: pnpm --dir apps/api test && pnpm --dir apps/coordinator test && pnpm --dir apps/cli test && pnpm --dir apps/tui test && pnpm --dir packages/core/ts test && pnpm --dir packages/identity/ts test && pnpm --dir packages/admin/ts test && pnpm --dir packages/transport-a2a/ts test && pnpm --dir packages/oauth/ts test && pnpm --dir packages/framework-adaptor/mcp-express/ts test && pnpm --dir packages/framework-adaptor/agent-crewai/ts test && pnpm --dir packages/framework-adaptor/agent-langchain/ts test && pnpm --dir packages/state-backend/tokencache-cloudflare/ts test && pnpm --dir packages/runtime-adaptor/cloudflare/ts test
